Add Mapbox Vector Tiles by URL: Kuria na Mapbox Vector Tiles ena URL
Add service to project: Vakuria na veiqaravi ki na cakacaka
Auto color based on fill: Roka vakaikoya ka yavutaki ena vakalewena
Categorize using field: Tuvanaka na kena vakayagataki na lomanibai
Choose a visualization type: Digitaka e dua na mataqali iyaloyalo
Choose an image to upload, along with op: Digitaka e dua na iyaloyalo me vakau, vata kei na ivola veisau digitaki me baleta na kena rawati. E rawa talega ni o dreta & biuta na iyaloyalo ki na edita, e dina ga ni o na sega ni rawa ni vakaraitaka na ivola alt ena sala oya.
Connect to data services: Sema ki na veiqaravi ni itukutuku
Drop a file to update this layer: Vakalutuma e dua na faile me vakavoui kina na tabana oqo
Drop Files Here to Upload: Vakacuruma eke na Faile mo Vakavodoka
Error importing service: Cala ni kena vakacurumi mai na veiqaravi
Error importing service. Could not gener: Cala ni kena vakacurumi mai na veiqaravi. Sega ni rawa ni vakavurea na ivakatakarakara ni iyaloyalo
Has changes since last publish: Sa veisau tiko mai na iotioti ni tabaki
Vakacuruma na veiqaravi vaka-tiled oqo me dua na ...
Label appears above categories. Enter a: Na ivakatakilakila e basika mai na iwasewase. Vakacuruma e dua na vanua mo vunitaka.
Labels the color scale. Use a space to h: Vakayacani ira na ivakarau roka. Vakayagataka e dua na vanua mo vuni kina.
Link to related project website: Link ki na itukutuku ni cakacaka veiwekani
Map tiles will be displayed below all ov: Ena vakaraitaki na iyaloyalo ena ruku ni ibinibini overlay, ka na rawa ni laurai na basemap mai na bulukau ni Mape.
Name: Yaca
No data was found at the provided URL. C: E sega ni kune e dua na itukutuku ena URL sa vakarautaki tu. Raica na URL ka tovolea tale.
No map services found: Sega na veiqaravi ni mape e kune
No map services in this folder: Sega na mape veiqaravi ena folder oqo
No vector layers found. Disable vector r: Sega ni kune e dua na vector layers. Vakayagataka na kerekere vector e vinakata me raica na raster layers.
Parts of shapefiles cannot be uploaded d: E sega ni rawa ni vakavodoki na tiki ni kena ibulibuli. Mo vakavodoka e dua na shapefile, bulia e dua na faile .zip vata kei na faile veisemati kece sara (.shp, .prj, .shx, kei na so tale) kei na upload na zipfile oya.

E sega ni rawa ni vakau vakadodonu na veitiki ni shapefiles. Me vakavodoki e dua na faile ni ibulibuli, bulia e dua na zipfile (.zip) vata kei na faile kece ni sidecar veiwekani (.shp, .prj, .shx, kei na so tale). Ena dua na lailai duadua, na nomu vakauta ena gadrevi me tiko kina na faile ni geometry (.shp) kei na faile ni vakaraitaki (.prj).
Quota Exceeded: Sa Sivia na iWiliwili ni iWiliwili
SeaSketch currently supports vector data: Ena gauna oqo sa tokona tiko o SeaSketch na itukutuku ni vector ena GeoJSON, Shapefile (zipped), GeoTiff, kei na FlatGeobuf formats.
SeaSketch ena gauna oqo e tokona na itukutuku ni vector ena GeoJSON, Shapefile (zipped), GeoTiff, NetCDF kei na ituvatuva ni FlatGeobuf.
Select a visualization type: Digitaka e dua na mataqali iyaloyalo
Style using field: iWalewale ni kena vakayagataki na lomanibai
The <2>PMTiles</2> format is an archive: Na <2>PMTiles</2> na ituvatuva e dua na akaivi ni tile kece sara e vakayagataki me vakacurumi kina na ibinibini oqo ena SeaSketch.
The following list includes all attribut: Na lisi oqo e oka kina na itovo kece e tokona na veiqaravi ni filter vauci. Digitaka na itovo o vinakata mo vakasavasavataka ena, kei na SeaSketch ena bulia na vanua ni fomu vou me tokona na vakasavasavataki ni itovo oqo. Na veivanua ni fomu oqori e rawa ni qai vakarautaki ka vakarautaki me vaka e gadrevi.
This appears to be a file type which Sea: Oqo e vaka me dua na mataqali faile ka sega ni tokona na SeaSketch na uploads spatial.
This appears to be an unsupported raster: Oqo e vaka me dua na mataqali faile raster sega ni tokoni. Me baleta na itukutuku raster, vakavodoka e dua na GeoTiff.
This appears to be only part of a shapef: E vaka me tiki walega ni dua na ibulibuli. Mo vakavodoka na shapefiles, bulia e dua na faile .zip vata kei na faile kece sara (.shp, .prj, .shx, kei na so tale) ka vakavodoka na zipfile oya.
This dataset only supports the currently: Na itukutuku oqo e tokona walega na mataqali iyaloyalo sa digitaki
This GeoJSON contains a GeometryCollecti: Na GeoJSON oqo e tiko kina e dua na GeometryCollection. Ena rairai sega ni vaka me vaka e namaki.
This GeoJSON is over 1MB and may take a: Na GeoJSON oqo sa sivia na 1MB ka na rawa ni taura e dua na gauna balavu me vakavodoki. Vakasamataka mo lavetaka na itukutuku ka vakavodoka ki SeaSketch me rawa ni tiled.
This GeoJSON took over 2 seconds to load: Na GeoJSON oqo a taura e 2 na sekodi me vakavodoki. Vakasamataka mo lavetaka na itukutuku ka vakavodoka ki SeaSketch me vinaka cake kina na cakacaka.
This response contains cache directives: Na isaunitaro oqo e tiko kina na idusidusi cache ka dusimaki ira na vakayagataka me ra lavetaka tale na dataset ena veigauna kece e vakaraitaki kina. Vakasamataka mo vakayagataka na ivakamacala e cake ni cache me vakatorocaketaki kina na cakacaka.
This service has already been added to y: Sa vakuri oti na veiqaravi oqo ki na ituvatuva ni lewena ni nomu cakacaka. O vinakata dina mo vakacuruma tale?
To replace a layer, upload a single file: Me sosomitaka e dua na layer, vakavodoka e dua na faile ka na sosomitaka na ibinibini sa tu rawa. Sogota na Edita ni ivurevure ni itukutuku kevaka o vinakata mo bulia na layers vou.
Upload spatial data files: Vakavodoka na faile ni itukutuku ni kasiviti
Use this option if you would like to dis: Vakayagataka na digidigi oqo kevaka o vinakata mo vakaraitaka na mape ni tile oqo ena dua na basemap sa tu rawa. E vinaka duadua me baleta na layers tiled ka matata na alpha.
Used to append text to values in the leg: Vakayagataki me ikuri ni itukutuku ki na yavunibula ena iTukuni.
You can only upload one file to update a: E rawa walega ni o vakavodoka e dua na faile mo vakavoui kina e dua na ibinibini.
You can speed up the process of finding: E rawa ni o vakatotolotaka na iwalewale ni kena kunei na iyalayala ni tileset ena nomu tokitaka na mape ki na vanua voleka ni dataset.
